title: Mysti Token
description: Misti Tokens adds nine unique tokens with special abilities, custom sounds, pets, transformations, and resource pack support. Players receive a random token on join, tokens cannot be lost or dropped, and all abilities are unlimited. Made by Pixel Beast.
body:
# Mysti Tokens

Mysti Tokens is a powerful Minecraft plugin that introduces customizable tokens with unique abilities, crafting, and fusion mechanics. Tokens can be collected, combined, and used to unlock exciting gameplay possibilities.


Features

• Unique token abilities
• Token crafting system
• Token fusion & upgrades
• Easy configuration
• Survival & adventure friendly.

Installation

1. Download the plugin .jar file.

2. Place it in your server’s plugins folder.

3. Restart the server.

Commands

/token give <player> <type> → Gives a specific token.

/token list → Shows all available tokens.

/token help → Shows command help.


Permissions

mystitokens.give → Access to give tokens.

mystitokens.use → Allows token usage.

mystitokens.admin → Full admin control.


Configuration

All settings are inside the config.yml file.
You can customize:

-> Token names
-> Abilities
-> Crafting recipes
-> Fusion rules

FAQ ⏬

Q: Does it work on Paper/Spigot?
A: Yes, fully compatible.

Q: Can I use it in survival servers?
A: Absolutely, it’s designed for both survival and roleplay.

Contributing -->

Suggestions and improvements are welcome! Join the Discord to share ideas.


Support •••>

For issues or questions, join the Pixel Beast Discord.

-> Made By ❤️ with Pixel Beast.
